name: jsongrep
description: Path query language for JSON, YAML, TOML, JSONL, CBOR, and MessagePack documents. JSONPath-inspired syntax with multi-format support.

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install jsongrep: cargo install jsongrep or brew install jsongrep

commands.description: Query structured data with path expressions (JSON, YAML, TOML, CBOR, MessagePack)

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install jsongrep: cargo install jsongrep or brew install jsongrep

args.name: --file
args.description: Input file path (reads from STDIN if omitted)

args.name: -n
args.description: Do not display matched JSON values

args.name: -F
args.description: Treat query as a literal field name and search at any depth

args.name: --with-path
args.description: Always print the path header, even when output is piped

args.name: --no-path
args.description: Never print the path header, even in a terminal

args.name: -f
args.description: Input format: auto, json, jsonl, yaml, toml, cbor, msgpack (default: auto)

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install jsongrep: cargo install jsongrep or brew install jsongrep
Install jsongrep: cargo install jsongrep or brew install jsongrep
